published.text:
Badge: Cost Guide

Headline:
AI Automation Cost for Small Business

Hero intro:
Most small business owners search for automation pricing and find vague ranges or enterprise quotes that start at $50K. That is not useful. This page gives you real numbers for the automations small service businesses actually buy — lead follow-up, CRM workflows, voice agents, onboarding systems — with honest breakdowns of what drives cost up and what keeps it manageable.

Hero subtext:
Below: what you will actually pay, what affects the price, common budget mistakes, and how to get the most value from your first automation investment.

Section titles:
- What AI automation costs by project type
- What drives the cost up — and what keeps it down
- Is your budget realistic?
- Hidden costs most businesses miss
- How to get the most value from your budget

CTA heading: Get a clear cost estimate for your automation project
CTA text: Book a 30-minute call. We will walk through your specific workflow, identify the right automation, and give you a fixed-price quote with no surprises.

edits.description: Table-first structure: leads with pricing data before prose
Evaluation section uses green/neutral columns for budget realism check
Considerations section covers hidden costs (platform fees, your time, training, iteration)
No hyperbole, no "save thousands" — just real numbers
CTA promises fixed pricing and no surprises
Interlinks: pricing, ROI guide, build-vs-buy, implementation roadmap

closer.text:
CTA heading: Get a clear cost estimate for your automation project
CTA text: Book a 30-minute call. We will walk through your specific workflow, identify the right automation, and give you a fixed-price quote with no surprises.
